arts.ttl: France predicted XI v Israel: Warren Zaïre-Emery to start and N’Golo Kanté to captain amid wholesale changes
arts.sum: Didier Deschamps is set to field a slightly experimental side with multiple key payers absent as France prepare to take on Israel in the UEFA Nations League on Thursday night. …

arts.ttl: Thousands of police officers but few visiting fans for France-Israel soccer match after attacks
arts.sum: There will be a heavy police presence but few visiting fans at Thursday’s soccer match between France and Israel in the Nations League, with authorities in Paris on high alert amid an increasingly tense political climate. But obviously none of us within the team can be insensitive to such a heavy context,” France coach Didier Deschamps said Wednesday.

arts.ttl: France vs Israel: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: France face Israel in the UEFA Nations League on Thursday. Preview includes team news, predicted lineups, how to watch on TV and more.

arts.ttl: Deschamps on Mbappé: 'Please leave him alone'
arts.sum: France coach Didier Deschamps showed frustration with questions about the absent Kylian Mbappé.

arts.ttl: How Italy will replace Ricci and Calafiori against Belgium and France in Nations League
arts.sum: Italy must cope without Samuele Ricci and Riccardo Calafiori in Nations League games against Belgium...

arts.ttl: Andy Carroll interview: ‘Fame has its dark sides... in France I live a much easier, simpler life’
arts.sum: Exclusive interview: The former Premier League striker on being forced out of Newcastle, suffering with depression, escaping to France and his new start at fourth-tier Bordeaux

arts.ttl: Official | Chelsea’s Malo Gusto one of four players to withdraw from France U21 squad
arts.sum: As initially reported by Le Parisien and confirmed by the French Football Federation (FFF), Chelsea’s Malo Gusto (21) has withdrawn from the France U21 side. The FFF have not specified the nature…

arts.ttl: N’Golo Kanté set to captain France
arts.sum: Recalled to the France squad for the ongoing international break, N’Golo Kanté looks set to captain the side when they face Israel on Thursday, as per a report from Le Parisien. …

arts.ttl: France's November international break fashion - ranked
